words.tip: Soft 'g' at end. 'Gelukkige verjaardag!' = Happy birthday! 'Ik verjaar op 5 mei' = My birthday is May 5th.
Soft 'g'. 'Bij de geboorte' = at birth. Related: 'de geboortedag' = birthday (lit. birth day).
Uniquely Belgian/Dutch! A casual drinks gathering held AFTER the baby is born, to welcome the newborn. Not a pre-birth gift party — that's an English/American tradition.
Trouwen (to marry) + feest (party). 'Het trouwfeest was super leuk!'
Long 'oh'. 'Naar de zoo gaan' = going to the zoo.
Also 'de bioscoop'. 'Naar de cinema gaan' = going to the cinema.
Stress on second syllable. In Belgium, cafés are often brown-pub style.
Stress on 2nd syllable. Belgium has world-class museums!
French origin. 'Uit eten gaan naar het restaurant' = going out to eat.
'De Grote Markt' is the main square in most Belgian cities.
